onboarding.welcome.title: Welcome to Lextures
onboarding.welcome.description: Let's personalize your learning path in about five minutes. You can skip any step.
onboarding.goal.title: What do you want to learn?
onboarding.goal.description: Pick a topic and describe your goal.
onboarding.goal.label: Your goal
onboarding.goal.placeholder: e.g. I want to learn Python by July
onboarding.experience.title: Your experience level
onboarding.experience.beginner.label: Beginner
onboarding.experience.beginner.hint: I am new to this topic
onboarding.experience.intermediate.label: Some experience
onboarding.experience.advanced.label: Advanced
onboarding.experience.advanced.hint: I want to deepen existing skills
onboarding.diagnostic.title: Quick placement quiz (optional)
onboarding.diagnostic.description: Five short questions help us suggest the right starting course. You can skip without penalty.
onboarding.habits.title: Study habits
onboarding.habits.reminders.label: Send me study reminders
onboarding.habits.reminders.hint: Separate from terms of service. Unchecked by default.
onboarding.consent.title: Consent
onboarding.consent.marketing: I agree to receive marketing communications (optional, unchecked by default)
onboarding.done.title: You're all set!
onboarding.done.description: Your dashboard is personalized from day one.
onboarding.done.browseCatalog: Browse the catalog to find courses matching your goal.
